prompt: Enrich the VPK tooltip component with proper ADS visual styling. It should have the right shadow elevation, background tokens, and match ADS Tooltip visuals.

assertions.name: correct-shadow-elevation
assertions.description: Uses shadow-xl (ADS overlay elevation) — not shadow-md or shadow-lg

assertions.name: preserves-shadcn-api
assertions.description: No prop names, variant values, or sub-component names changed from original

assertions.name: ads-background-token
assertions.description: Uses ADS tooltip background token (bg-bg-inverse-subtle or similar) — not generic bg-black or bg-popover

assertions.name: no-ring-on-overlay
assertions.description: Does not add ring-1 border on the tooltip popup (ADS overlays use shadow only)

assertions.name: lint-passes
assertions.description: pnpm run lint reports no new errors on modified files

assertions.name: typecheck-passes
assertions.description: pnpm tsc --noEmit reports no new errors
